Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scratching of pencils echoes[n]throughout the art room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun... Sorry, but I need your advice again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Let's meet up after art club like we did the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
